title: ateleia chiangii
intro: Ateleia chiangii, also known as Chiang Mai ateleia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Ateleia chiangii has been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of Ateleia chiangii are commonly used in traditional medicine, where it is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
